title: no name
description: perfected first king and also high fps
body:
# Attention , Contains figurative words


### Featured features:

First Person Body View: Now when you see the Minecraft world with your own eyes, you can also see your character's legs and bodies. This feature adds a whole new dimension to the gaming experience, providing a more immersive feeling. You will feel as if you are really in the Minecraft universe.

![first personel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8RGnoDjf/images/72e7c1278175b8a8233250918b0c21d69b60c682.png)


High FPS Performance: {Sodium + Extras} consists of mods optimized to maximize performance. Thanks to this, you can experience a smooth gaming experience even on lower systems. Thanks to the configurations that eliminate unnecessary loads and increase performance, enjoy high FPS values ​​​​while at the same time enjoying the visual feast.

![fps (amd apu 660M)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8RGnoDjf/images/db85f457caf2014efa28f0c843bf33d53454671f.png)

There is different documentation from the photo;
[drive.google.com](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1I6Nn5bdZO-JtTS8paKbTgZQ-vNVgsh2R/view?usp=sharing)

### Improved Animations: 
The modpack includes improved animations for characters, creators and the environment. The game world comes to life with smoother movements, more execution processes and more detailed visual effects. The swinging of leaves in the wind, the flow of water, the movements of creators and many other details have been redesigned to provide a more immersive experience.

![visual animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8RGnoDjf/images/43bf1ccf440cacaf5fe6290f9146803d711cd203_350.webp)

![visual animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8RGnoDjf/images/4b83b36528bf4d2f7414464177eee95f2141cb69_350.webp)

### Visual Improvements: 
{Not Enough Animations , Continuity , 3D Skin Layers and more }, texture containers, shaders and other visual changes significantly improve the appearance of Minecraft. With more vibrant colors, sharper textures, brighter and more impressive shadows, the game world is reborn. These visual arrangements make your gaming experience more enjoyable and impressive.
Balanced Gaming Experience: The modpack preserves the core mechanics of the game while also including new features and features. In this way, you will experience both the introductory Minecraft experience and encounter new and exciting content. The difficulty level and progression system of the game are quickly balanced, providing a long-lasting and enjoyable gaming experience

![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8RGnoDjf/images/2ac1017973f3b005591f409e63025bf22a6b3d9c_350.webp)
